action.reasoning: Observation: v6 achieved 0.6423 test bal_acc (new best). Weak on bobcat(0.23), squirrel(0.19). Analysis: Partial DINOv2 unfreeze works well. Decision: Train v7 with 4 unfrozen layers, stronger class weighting for weak classes, 25 epochs. Also improve ensemble in predict.py.
